title: Vietnamese Pork Sandwich
description: A delicious Vietnamese-inspired sandwich filled with marinated pork and pickled vegetables. Perfect for a quick and flavorful lunch.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, whisk together malt, midnight, and 1 tablespoon of fish sauce.
2. Add the sliced pork to the marinade and mix to coat. Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
3. Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
4. Remove the pork from the marinade and cook for 5-7 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, toast the sandwich bread by grilling it for 1-2 minutes per side.
6. Assemble the sandwiches by spreading a layer of pickled vegetables on each toasted bread slice.
7. Add a few slices of the cooked pork to each sandwich, followed by a sprinkle of cilantro.
